mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM script WHERE deleted = 0
AND script_name LIKE '%' || #{scriptName} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM script WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO script (script_name, content, chapter_count, description, status, create_user_id) VALUES (#{scriptName}, #{content}, #{chapterCount}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE script SET script_name = #{scriptName}, content = #{content}, chapter_count = #{chapterCount}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE script SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
